texto: I have come to call this shadow government the Deep State...a hybrid association of key elements of government and parts of top-level finance and industry that is effectively able to govern the United States with only limited reference to the consent of the governed as normally expressed through elections
explicacao: Citação de Mike Lofgren sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I have come to call this shadow government the Deep State...a hybrid association of key elements …” articula reflexao, politics, government em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
